overall.description: A cinematic third-person game engine sequence following a female character walking along a mountain trail at night. The scene transitions from a dry stone-walled path to an open rainy meadow, featuring dramatic lighting from lanterns against a blue-hour sky with detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with stone retaining wall and lantern posts

events.description: a black bird appears standing in the middle of the path ahead
character passes a lit wooden lantern post on the left side
bird takes flight and camera briefly shifts to a low angle looking upward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside a stone wall, approaching and startling a bird

notable_agents.action: black bird standing on the path, then taking flight as the character approaches

entered.detail: tall rocky stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
large dark mountain silhouette visible against the cloudy night sky
tall wooden post with a warm glowing lantern providing orange light
tall pine trees on the hillside to the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left and trees on the right. A black bird stands in the path ahead, taking flight as she approaches. She passes a wooden lantern post casting warm light, with a massive mountain looming in the background under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow with distant tree line

events.description: exits the narrow walled path into a wide open meadow area
rain begins to fall, creating a misty atmosphere and wet ground reflections

agents.ego_description: walking through an open grassy field as rain begins to fall

entered.detail: open field with tall grass and scattered low bushes
dense dark line of trees visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide grassy meadow under a cloudy night sky. The stone wall and lantern post fall behind as the character walks through tall grass toward a distant forest. Rain begins to fall around the 24-second mark, creating a misty atmosphere with visible raindrops in the lantern light.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy grassland trail approaching a lit lantern post

events.description: character approaches a second wooden lantern post visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through steady rain, approaching another lantern

entered.detail: second wooden lantern post with warm glow visible ahead on the left
large rock formation visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking through the steady rain in an open grassland, the character approaches a second lantern post that grows from a distant glow to a near presence on the left. Rocky outcrops appear on the right horizon while the distant forest remains visible through the misty rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with cliff face and scattered pines

events.description: character passes the second lantern post and enters a more enclosed rocky area

agents.ego_description: walking past the lantern into a narrower path with rocky cliffs on the left

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face rising immediately to the left of the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the second lantern post and enters a more enclosed mountain path with a steep rocky cliff rising on the left. The terrain becomes rougher with scattered evergreen trees, and the path narrows as it winds through the rocky landscape under the rainy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered stone-walled path into a wide, rain-swept mountain meadow before narrowing again into a rugged cliffside trail. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall and trees, where a black bird takes flight and a wooden lantern casts a warm glow against a looming mountain. As the path opens into a wide grassy meadow, the stone wall falls away and rain begins to descend, creating a misty atmosphere with visible droplets dancing in the light. The scene then expands across the open grassland toward a distant forest, with a second lantern post emerging from the gloom as rocky outcrops appear on the horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character past the second light and into a more enclosed landscape, where the terrain becomes rougher and the path winds beneath a steep rocky cliff and scattered evergreen trees.
